Workshops & Events

Feeling crafty? Why not spend a relaxing and fun couple of hours learning from expert artists with your choice from our wide selection of workshops

Book online

Weekly Groups

Session Day Time Price
After school arts and craft session Every Thursday 3.45pm (8–11 year olds)
4.45pm (12–17 year olds)		 £8 per session
Crochet Circle, for confident beginners/improvers to receive help with a project (BYO project) Every Saturday 10am – 11am £5
Handicrafts Group, social group for confident crafters (BYO craft project) Every Saturday 11.15am – 12.15pm Free

Looking for the perfect gift?

You can also buy gift vouchers online for specific classes or choose an amount between £10 – £100.

Buy a Gift Voucher

Note that online gift vouchers can only be used for online bookings. Physical gift vouchers are available in store.
